source: Astronexus HYG v4.1, combining Hipparcos, Yale Bright Star, and Gliese catalog data

physicalModel.luminosity: HYG lum when present; otherwise from absMag with per-class bolometric correction (Eker 2018 / Mv_sun=4.83)
physicalModel.temperature: Ballesteros (2012) B-V color-temperature formula, clamped to HYG ci range
physicalModel.mass: Eker et al. (2018, MNRAS 479, 5491) mass-luminosity relation (main seq); coarse prior for giants/supergiants
physicalModel.radius: Eker (2018) mass-radius polynomial (0.179-1.5 Msun); Stefan-Boltzmann otherwise; S-B for all giants (correct large R)
